changes: Make sure to update lyre_bridge alongside this resource. The previous release was broken.
New Lyre Scripts structure: install and start lyre_bridge before this resource.
lyre_bridge is open source and is not included in Granted Assets ZIPs; download it here: https://github.com/lyrescripts/lyre_bridge
Inventory usable items and framework compatibility now go through lyre_bridge.
INVENTORY_ITEMS is no longer shipped as a separate folder; add the documented items to your inventory from the new release package/docs.
Release package cleaned and simplified; compare your old config with the new config before updating.
